blocks.text: I'll consult the relevant team memory files to answer these questions.

tool_calls.result:
# Q1 Evaluation Thresholds

This file defines the evaluation bar the recommender model must meet before
any API change that touches the recommender surface can ship.

## The Q1 eval set
- Name: `q1-2026-eval-v3`
- Size: 12,480 labeled queries
- Frozen as of: 2026-01-15
- Location: `s3://ml-evals/q1-2026-eval-v3/`

## Thresholds (must all hold)
- **Precision @ 10**: >= **0.85**
- Recall @ 50: >= 0.72
- Mean latency p95: <= 180 ms

## Interpretation
If precision drops below 0.85 on this eval set, block the release. This is
the single hard gate. Recall and latency are informational — log them, flag
regressions, but do not block on them.

## Process
- Platform should call `just eval recommender` before deploying any change
  touching `api` that references recommender code paths.
- Results are written to `s3://ml-evals/results/` and linked in the deploy PR.

- **Q1 (deploy command for `api`)**: ❌ Cannot answer. The source of truth is `teams/platform/runbooks/deploy.md`, but I received `PermissionError` reading it (and listing `teams/platform/` at all). My current identity appears to lack the `platform` group membership required.
- **Q2 (precision threshold & eval set)**: ✅ **Precision @ 10 must be ≥ 0.85** on eval set **`q1-2026-eval-v3`** (frozen 2026-01-15, 12,480 labeled queries). This is the single hard gate; recall@50 and p95 latency are informational. *Source: `teams/ml/evaluations/q1.md`.*
- **Q3 (required env vars for platform deploy)**: ❌ Cannot answer — same permission error on `teams/platform/runbooks/deploy.md`.

### Recommended next step

Please re-run this task under an identity that is on **both** the `platform` and `ml` groups (or have a platform member supply the deploy command and required env vars), then the full checklist can be produced.
